Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-21-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
William Kelly, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sharon Lopez, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Reggie Dixon as follows:
Damages $3,340.00
Costs $365.50
Punitive Damages $10,000.00, for a total of $13,705.50
Judgment signed in open court.
